overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy neon-lit night market under an overpass, transitioning via a hard cut to a wide urban boulevard engulfed in an orange dust storm with palm trees and towering megastructures. The clip showcases two distinct atmospheric zones: a dense cyberpunk market with Asian-inspired red lanterns and a desolate dusty plaza with holographic billboards.

events.description: approaching the illuminated FOODSCAPE market entrance from the dark underpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass toward the market entrance with neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking ahead toward the market entrance

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead creating a covered walkway
large illuminated red sign reading FOODSCAPE marking the market entrance
wall with colorful graffiti and a transit map display
thick support pillar for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, foggy underpass beneath a massive concrete transit structure. The camera follows a character walking toward a glowing red FOODSCAPE sign that marks the entrance to a market. The environment is damp and illuminated by artificial neon lights, with graffiti visible on the right wall and scattered pedestrians moving through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with overhead lanterns and food stalls

events.description: passing under the FOODSCAPE archway into the covered market interior
navigating through denser crowd in the narrow market passage

agents.ego_description: weaving through the narrow market street passing food stalls and pedestrians under hanging red lanterns

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside a wooden stall with glowing items

entered.detail: metal archway entrance with the FOODSCAPE neon sign overhead
strings of traditional red Asian-style lanterns hanging overhead
dense web of black cables and wires crisscrossing above the street
wooden and metal makeshift shop structures lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, bustling market street beneath the FOODSCAPE archway. Red paper lanterns and tangled overhead wires create a canopy above the tiled walkway. Wooden stalls and shanty shops line both sides, glowing with neon signs. The crowd density increases as the character navigates through pedestrians in this enclosed cyberpunk bazaar atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban boulevard during dust storm with megastructures

events.description: hard cut transition from night market to bright orange dusty outdoor plaza
visibility decreases as dust storm intensifies around the palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide dust-covered boulevard toward towering buildings visible through the orange haze

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the boulevard, partially obscured by dust
massive futuristic glass and steel towers rising into the dust clouds
large glowing advertisement screens mounted on building facades
thick orange-tinted dust or sandstorm reducing visibility

segments.scene_description: Following a hard cut, the scene shifts dramatically to a wide, open urban boulevard engulfed in an intense orange dust storm. Tall palm trees line the concrete walkway while massive megastructures and holographic billboards loom in the distance through the haze. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to diffused natural light filtered through the thick dust, creating a desolate, post-apocalyptic atmosphere contrasting sharply with the previous enclosed market.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a claustrophobic, neon-lit night market into a vast, desolate urban boulevard engulfed in a dust storm. It begins in a dark, foggy underpass beneath a concrete transit structure, following a character toward a glowing red FOODSCAPE sign amidst damp walls and misty air. As the character passes under the archway, the environment tightens into a bustling market street characterized by a canopy of red lanterns, tangled wires, and glowing shanty shops. The scene then shifts dramatically to a wide-open boulevard where the artificial neon gives way to diffused orange light filtered through a thick haze of dust. Finally, the view expands across a concrete walkway lined with palm trees, with towering megastructures and holographic billboards looming in the distance.
